product_depth.justification: All 6 core sections present with domain-specific content. Methodology table covers 5 named frameworks with selection guide. Verification strategy maps stage transitions. Deliverables categorized as primary/supporting/governance. Goes beyond minimum with methodology selection guide table.

functionality.justification: Criteria names (qualification_depth, pipeline_coverage, deal_documentation, close_readiness) match index skill exactly. All 4 criteria have complete 0-5 anchor tables with 6 rows each. 5 methodologies present in selection table. Anti-patterns reference correct criteria names.

visual_design.justification: Section formatting follows harness-sdlc/SKILL.md pattern. Tables use consistent pipe formatting. Section numbering matches template. Horizontal rules between sections.

code_quality.justification: YAML frontmatter valid with quoted description. Security considerations embedded in checklists (customer data classification, PII handling, pricing confidentiality, competitor intel misuse). Anti-patterns have specific detection signals. No broken references.

contract_checks.evidence: All 6 sections present: Section 1 (Sales Methodology), Section 2 (Development Methodology), Section 3 (Verification Strategy), Section 4 (Deliverable Verification), Section 5 (Evaluation Criteria), Section 6 (Sprint Contract Checklists). Each has domain-specific content grounded in real sales frameworks.

4 evaluation criteria with complete 0-5 anchor tables: qualification_depth (6 rows), pipeline_coverage (6 rows), deal_documentation (6 rows), close_readiness (6 rows). Each anchor is specific and differentiable.
5 methodologies in Section 1 table: MEDDPICC, Challenger Sale, SPIN Selling, Sandler Selling System, BANT. Each has when-to-use guidance and harness mapping.
Section formatting matches harness-sdlc/SKILL.md: numbered sections, horizontal rules, tables with headers, subsections where appropriate.

YAML frontmatter has name: harness-sales and quoted description. Security anti-patterns present: Pricing Leak (drop to max 1) and Competitor Intel Misuse (drop to max 0). Security checks embedded in discovery and proposal checklists.

feature_evidence.reason: All 6 verification steps pass: file exists, 6 core sections present, 4 criteria with 0-5 anchors, 5 methodologies in selection table, 8 anti-patterns including happy ears/single-threading/premature discounting/ghosted pipeline/demo before discovery/no mutual action plan, security embedded in checklists.

internal_consistency.justification: Criteria names match index skill. Anti-pattern penalties reference correct criteria. Stage transitions in verification match pipeline phases.

intentionality.justification: Methodologies are real named frameworks with practitioner-accurate descriptions. Anti-patterns describe specific seller behaviors, not generic warnings. Detection signals are observable and testable.

craft.justification: 6-section structure follows SDLC domain skill pattern. Tables consistent. Anchors progress from absent (0) to excellent (5) with clear differentiation at each level.

fitness_for_purpose.justification: A sales manager or AE could use these checklists and criteria to evaluate deal quality. Anchors describe real deal states. Anti-patterns match common sales failure modes.
